summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of NEMS (National Examination Management System). Backend API testing achieved 92.3% success rate with all core endpoints working. Frontend UI testing confirmed all authentication flows, admin dashboard, student portal, and registration functionality working correctly.

minor_issues.issue: Returns 11 records instead of 10 due to new student registration during testing

passed_tests: Health check endpoint returns UP status
Admin login with admin@nems.com / admin123 works correctly
Student login with student1@example.com / password123 works correctly
Student registration flow creates new user and auto-login
Dashboard stats API returns 10 records per module
Admin Dashboard shows stats cards and navigation links
Admin Manage Students page shows student records with working search
Admin Schedule Exams page displays 10 exam schedules
Admin Assign Rooms page shows rooms grid and allocations table with tab switching
Admin Publish Results page shows results with statistics
Student Dashboard displays quick action cards and user info
Student Admit Card page shows seat allocation data
Student View Results page displays comprehensive results table
Student Raise Grievance page shows existing grievances and working form submission
Logout functionality works for both admin and student
Backend API endpoints return correct data
